scripts.db:deploy: cd packages/server && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.db:setup: cd packages/server && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate deploy && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: cd packages/server && npx prisma migrate reset --force && npx prisma db seed
scripts.start:local: npm run docker:db && node -e "setTimeout(()=>{}, 4000)" && npm run db:setup && concurrently --kill-others --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" || npm run docker:down
